section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subpart such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title VII, § 778, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title VII, § 709(2), Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3377.)
